consumer kit
properties.purpose: What gets installed into a project being designed.

properties.name: reflow2-mcp
properties.purpose: The agent-facing MCP surface over one graph.

properties.decision: detect_gaps sorts anchored gaps before project-level phase nudges, severity within each band.
properties.name: A gap that names nodes outranks a phase nudge
properties.rationale: A named gap says something is wrong NOW; a nudge says what comes next. Ranking 'next' above 'broken' made three brownfield trials do the useless thing first. Nudges are demoted, never suppressed. Decided 2026-07-19 (https://claude.ai/code/session_013aumVdHrRHu24cLirn6Cam); evidence: gap-surfacing disciplines 3 and 8.

properties.decision: possible_duplicate is a DETECT gap; HEAL merges only on a human-drawn DUPLICATES edge.
properties.name: Suspected duplicates are asked, never merged
properties.rationale: apply_heal deletes a node with no undo, so merge is safe only because the endpoints were asserted; a heuristic must not drive it. A gap can be acknowledged, a HEAL defect cannot be dismissed. Decided 2026-07-19 (https://claude.ai/code/session_013aumVdHrRHu24cLirn6Cam); evidence: 3dtictactoe trial, BL-27/BL-29.

properties.decision: single_point_of_failure candidates are Components, Interfaces, Resources, Environments.
properties.name: Only things that operate can be single points of failure
properties.rationale: The suggested fix is add_redundancy, and redundancy is only coherent for running parts; a golden thread converges on intent by design, so intent hubs are the thread working. 22 of 22 false positives cleared, 4 true survivors. Decided 2026-07-19 (https://claude.ai/code/session_013aumVdHrRHu24cLirn6Cam); BL-5.

properties.decision: verification_coverage counts passing checks; a failing check is its own 0.8 gap.
properties.name: Verified means a check that passes, not one that exists
properties.rationale: A failing test used to satisfy the gap that asked for a test, and passing vs failing were byte-identical to every diagnostic — counting test nodes while ignoring test results. Decided 2026-07-19 (https://claude.ai/code/session_013aumVdHrRHu24cLirn6Cam); evidence: phase-coverage trial, BL-30.

properties.decision: RocksDB directory beside the repo, exports as the durable, diffable record.
properties.name: The graph lives as a repo file, embedded — not a service
properties.rationale: The service's strongest argument (concurrency) is hypothetical while there is one writer; it would put the user's design on a machine they do not control and is permanent operational cost. Reopening conditions are written down. Decided 2026-07-18 (surface-plan.md); BL-12/BL-15 carry the consequences.

properties.decision: Per capability: drifting / confirmed / unexamined, with the disposition counts visible.
properties.name: The confirmation ledger reports claim history, never judges a claim
properties.rationale: Five design_holds claims with zero design edits is the erosion signature and the ledger makes it legible — but judging a specific claim false is semantic, and a deterministic detector would fire on every stable design with cosmetic churn (the unexpected_coupling lesson). Decided 2026-07-19 (https://claude.ai/code/session_013aumVdHrRHu24cLirn6Cam); BL-35.

properties.decision: set_artifact_checksum requires a disposition: design_holds (a dated claim) or design_updated (naming the design-side ChangeEvent, linked to the artifact).
properties.name: Silent drift-accept does not exist
properties.rationale: 'Accept the file, leave the design alone, say nothing' is how a design erodes into fiction over N legitimate fix cycles while reporting zero gaps — the failure that sank the original reflow. Decided 2026-07-19 (https://claude.ai/code/session_013aumVdHrRHu24cLirn6Cam); evidence: erosion trials, BL-33.

properties.decision: Renderers may only emit what the graph states; everything else is confessed as a finding.
properties.name: A view is a projection of the graph; renderer fill-ins are defects
properties.rationale: UAF/DoDAF doctrine from the author: the graph stores all design detail, the agent only renders viewpoints. If rendering requires extrapolation, something is missing inside reflow2 — almost always. Decided 2026-07-19 (https://claude.ai/code/session_013aumVdHrRHu24cLirn6Cam); render_views.py, BL-40.

properties.name: Reflow 2.0
properties.objective: Keep a design coherent from concept through operations

properties.name: A system that already exists can be brought under design control
properties.statement: Requirements, functions and structure can be recovered from a running system.

properties.name: An agent can drive the whole loop
properties.statement: Every capability is reachable from a coding agent over one surface.

properties.name: Design stays coherent across its lifecycle
properties.statement: When anything changes in any phase, the ripples are found and surfaced.

properties.name: Design anything, not only software
properties.statement: Software, hardware, a document, a process — the vocabulary stays neutral.

properties.name: Every artifact traces to the intent it serves
properties.statement: Traceability runs from concept through operations without a break.

properties.name: The past is never overwritten
properties.statement: Updating the design to match the build must not erase what was intended.

properties.name: The user never needs systems engineering
properties.statement: The graph carries the discipline; the user answers plain questions.

properties.name: No silent fallbacks or drops
properties.statement: Failures and skipped work are surfaced loudly, never swallowed.

properties.name: Released equals designed
properties.statement: At release the design must describe what was actually released.

properties.name: A design survives a reflow2 upgrade
properties.statement: An existing graph opens, or is refused loudly with what to do.
